title: manettia pedunculata
intro: Manettia pedunculata, also known as the Jamaican firecracker or red bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of the Americas and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Manettia pedunculata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall health.
